council_balance.description: Reveal cards until 3 different factions appear. 1st = Trump, 2nd = Elite, 3rd = Wobbly (low wins when LED).

scoring.description: Won tricks go face-down into player's Collected Stash. 1 card = 1 VP.

intern_rule.description: Playing a rank 0 card draws 1 card from the Vault immediately.

final_bell.description: When a player empties their hand, finish trick, then player to their left leads one final trick.

RED.name: Borrow Aggressively
RED.effect: Reveal 1 random card from opponent's hand. May discard 1 from your hand to force them to discard the revealed card.

ORANGE.name: Snack Forecast
ORANGE.effect: Look at top 3 of Vault. Add 1 to hand. Put other 2 on bottom.

YELLOW.name: Quick Adjustment
YELLOW.effect: Look at top card of Vault. May swap 1 card from hand with it.

GREEN.name: Flow Correction
GREEN.effect: Draw 2 cards. Then place 1 card from hand on bottom of Vault.

BLUE.name: Fair Trade (Probably)
BLUE.effect: Take 1 random card from opponent. Give them 1 card from your hand.

PURPLE.name: Pocket the Past
PURPLE.effect: Bank 1 card from hand to Stash (free VP). Draw 1. Discard 1.

new_round.description: Shuffle everything and re-deal. Lowest score leads new round.
